calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-007 Path Memory Ablation (Proper) -- residue field zeroing degrades hippocampal proposals
items.notes: Fixed: zeroed_eval returns [batch] not [batch,1] to match real evaluate() signature.

items.title: MECH-029 BreathOscillator Uncommitted Windows -- sweep-phase vs inter-sweep commitment contrast
GPU/CPU Scale Crossover Benchmark -- world_dim=[32,64,128,256]
items.description: Operational benchmark (not a scientific experiment). Sweeps world_dim=[32,64,128,256] and measures CPU vs GPU training throughput at each scale. Identifies the GPU crossover point on current hardware. Provides baseline data for comparison against Spark hardware when available. Results recorded to evidence/experiments/v3_scale_benchmark/. Not tied to a scientific claim.

items.title: MECH-102 Depletion Ordering -- SPARSE vs DENSE hazard density (last-resort ordering)
items.description: Discriminative pair for MECH-102 last-resort ordering: SPARSE (size=10, 2 hazards, ~2% density) vs DENSE (size=7, 8 hazards, ~16% density). Tests whether ethical policy scales avoidance proportionally to alternative availability and shows anticipatory harm_eval elevation before forced contacts. PASS: C1 reduction_sparse>0.70, C2 reduction_dense>0.25, C3 anticipatory_delta>0.01 (if n>=10), C4 ethical_vs_random>0.005 (if n>=10). SD-008 alpha_world=0.9. Addresses EXP-0016/EVB-0013.

items.title: MECH-098 Reafference vs No-Reafference -- harm calibration discriminative pair
items.description: Discriminative pair for MECH-098: REAFFERENCE (SD-007 ON, reafference_action_dim=action_dim) vs NO_REAFFERENCE (SD-007 OFF, ablation). Both use alpha_world=0.9 (SD-008), z_self/z_world split (SD-005), SD-010 disabled. Primary discriminator: delta_approach_gap = gap_approach_REAFFERENCE - gap_approach_NO_REAFFERENCE. PASS: C1 delta>0.02, C2 gap_REAFFERENCE>0.06, C3 gap_NO_REAFFERENCE>0. Addresses EXP-0001/EVB-0001 mandatory decision checkpoint deadline 2026-03-26. Also provides behavioral evidence for EXP-0002 (SD-007).
